notes: This file governs automatic writeback only; it is not the main governance policy.
Automatic governance writeback is limited to G1 guidance updates for coder and tester authority files.
Routing policy, runtime scripts, validation baselines, and shared workflow docs still require explicit Aide review.

fake-test.guidance: Reject assertion-free or smoke-only checks as task completion evidence; tests must prove behavior with meaningful assertions.

missing-test.guidance: Do not mark validation complete until every claimed requirement has at least one real test or explicit justified gap.

placeholder.guidance: Treat TODOs, placeholders, and stubbed paths as incomplete work; do not present them as shipped behavior.

missing-implementation.guidance: Do not report implementation complete when the behavior is still partial, scaffolded, or missing a working path.

plan-mismatch.guidance: When the implementation diverges from the plan or acceptance criteria, stop and surface the mismatch before continuing.

error-handling.guidance: For failure-path changes, add or update explicit error-handling behavior and run at least one check that exercises the failure path.
